name: Section 83(b) Election

eligibility.description: Must be made within 30 days of the transfer of property (such as restricted stock) that is subject to a substantial risk of forfeiture.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Allows a service provider to include the fair market value of restricted property in gross income at the time of transfer rather than waiting for the property to vest.
